description: Pure database adapter fix - MariaDB relationJoins capability check with only ORM imports
rationale: Call-graph analysis: mariadb.ts (production adapter code) and mariadb.test.ts (test file) form 2 disconnected components. The test file imports the adapter but call-graph analysis treats test files as separate components when they do not share transitive call edges with production code = 2 components = WARNING.
notes: Previously pass (single database domain). Call-graph analysis identifies the test file as disconnected from production code, forming 2 components. This is a stricter but defensible interpretation: test and production code are separate scoping concerns.
